who: restaurant general managers processing 5–15 shift schedules/day
offer: For restaurant general managers processing 5–15 shift schedules/day, inaccurate labor cost reporting causes overspending. We provide automated labor cost reports instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate labor cost reporting leads to overspending.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on labor costs
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for managers
try_it: Let users try manual entry of shift schedules and invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
